summary: Completed comprehensive testing of restructured Onspotly multi-page landing site. Successfully tested all 8 pages, reel transition animations, navigation functionality, form submissions, and mobile responsiveness. Both backend APIs and frontend integration working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 8 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Home page Hero and Audience sections render correctly
All 8 pages load with correct routes (/, /how-it-works, /features, /pricing, /cities, /become-shooter, /join, /privacy)
Reel transition animation appears between page navigations
Desktop navigation between all pages works
Mobile navigation menu and page switching works
6 explore cards on home page navigate to correct pages
Continue Exploring nav links at bottom of pages work
Active nav link highlighting (white text for current page)
Waitlist form submission with backend integration (success message shown)
Shooter application form submission with backend integration (success message shown)
Form validation for missing fields (422 error responses)
Privacy Policy page accessible via direct URL
Cities page displays US Map component
Logo navigation back to home page works
